content:
It sounds like the information you came across might be referring to an upcoming project involving Will Smith in the "Men in Black" franchise. However, as of my latest update in June 2024, there hasn't been an official announcement confirming that Will Smith will star again in a new "Men in Black" film.

Will Smith originally starred as Agent J in the first three "Men in Black" movies (1997, 2002, 2012). The series later saw a spin-off, "Men in Black: International" (2019), without his involvement. Since then, there have been talks and rumors about reviving the franchise with original cast members, including Will Smith, but no definitive project has been publicly confirmed.

If you saw a recent claim, it might be speculation or based on early development news. For the most accurate and up-to-date information, I recommend checking official announcements from Sony Pictures or Will Smith’s verified social media channels.

If you want, I can help keep an eye on updates or provide information on other upcoming projects involving Will Smith.
